ch7_start.text: The dark veins on your arm are pulsing. You rush to the Medbay, but the heavy blast doors are sealed. A biohazard warning flashes in bright red: 'TOXIC SPORE CONTAMINATION'. Through the reinforced glass, you see Dr. Aris wearing a hazard suit.

ch7_aris_talk.text: Dr. Aris jumps, then approaches the intercom. 'You can't come in here. The air is saturated with spores. I've been trying to synthesize a cure from the samples I... acquired. But it's mutating too fast.'
ch7_aris_talk.speaker: Dr. Aris

choices.text: 'You knew about this? Before the breach?'
'Miller was selling the mud to you, wasn't he?'

ch7_aris_confession.text: 'I didn't know it was this aggressive! I thought it was just a localized extremophile bacteria. If I synthesized a cure, Corporate would have promoted me to the orbital labs.' She looks at her hands, trembling. 'I was wrong.'
ch7_aris_confession.speaker: Dr. Aris

choices.text: 'Let me in. I'm infected. I need help.'

ch7_aris_canister.text: She pales. 'He needed the money. I needed the samples off the books. We didn't know it was part of a larger... hive mind.' She looks at her hands, trembling. 'I was so arrogant.'
ch7_aris_canister.speaker: Dr. Aris

choices.text: 'Let me in. I'm infected. I need help.'

ch7_beg_entry.text: 'I can't risk the spores escaping into Sector A,' Aris says, her voice breaking. 'The only prototype suppressant I have is in here. I'm sorry.' She turns off the intercom.

choices.text: Try to force the airlock override.
Use the auditor security codes David verified earlier.

ch7_force_lock.text: You bash the panel, trying to cross the wires, but the system locks down permanently. Dr. Aris is sealed inside. You have no cure. You stagger away as the pain in your arm intensifies.

ch7_code_entry.text: The doors hiss open. Aris screams as you step inside, grabbing the prototype injector from the counter and slamming it into your thigh. The pain recedes slightly. 'You fool!' Aris yells. 'You've compromised the seal!'

choices.text: Seal the door behind you and leave her.
